title: Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Imagine you're a font designer in Nigeria, pouring your heart and soul into creating unique, beautiful fonts that you want to sell online. But when you try to set up a payment system, you're blocked by PayPal and Stripe. You can't even list your fonts for sale on platforms like Gumroad or Payhip. The reason? Your country is restricted due to banking limitations or KYC requirements. You need a new way to get paid for your digital creations without the hassle of traditional payment processors. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in – a platform that lets you sell fonts online without PayPal, giving you the freedom to connect directly with your customers and get paid for your work.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's compare what each option actually offers. PayPal and Stripe are two of the most popular payment processors, but they're not available in many countries. Gumroad and Payhip are platforms that let you sell digital products, but they require you to create an account and abide by their rules. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offers a complete infrastructure for digital creators to sell their products without relying on traditional payment processors. With Unchained Commerce, you can create a shop, add products, and process payments all without needing to create an account with a third-party service like PayPal or Stripe. You can even sell to customers in countries that are restricted by other platforms.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

So how do these options handle restricted countries? PayPal and Stripe simply block access to countries that are restricted, leaving creators like you without a way to get paid. Gumroad and Payhip may let you list your products for sale, but they'll still require you to create an account and verify your identity, which can be a hassle. Unchained Commerce takes a different approach. By using a decentralized payment processor like NOWPayments, you can process payments in 300+ coins without needing to verify your identity or create an account. This means you can finally sell your fonts to customers in countries that are restricted by other platforms.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Let's talk about payment speed, fees, and real costs. PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for every transaction, and their payment speed can be slow. Gumroad and Payhip have lower fees, but they still require you to create an account and verify your identity. Unchained Commerce offers fast payment processing, low fees, and no need to create an account or verify your identity. With Unchained Commerce, you can get paid instantly for your fonts, and you'll only pay a small fee for each transaction.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Now let's talk about automation and delivery capabilities. PayPal and Stripe require you to manually process payments and deliver your products, which can be time-consuming. Gumroad and Payhip offer some automation features, but they still require you to create an account and verify your identity. Unchained Commerce takes automation to the next level. With our Web3 Wallet Connect feature, you can automatically deliver your fonts to customers as soon as they make a payment. This means you can focus on creating more fonts, rather than manually processing payments and delivering products.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So which option is right for you? If you're tired of being blocked by PayPal and Stripe, and you want to sell your fonts online without the hassle of traditional payment processors, Unchained Commerce is the clear choice. With our complete infrastructure for digital creators, you can create a shop, add products, process payments, and deliver your fonts all without needing to create an account with a third-party service. Don't let PayPal and Stripe hold you back any longer – join Unchained Commerce today and start selling your fonts online with confidence.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

So, how do I get started with Unchained Commerce? Simply visit our website, sign up for a free account, and start creating your shop and adding products. You can then use our Web3 Wallet Connect feature to automatically deliver your fonts to customers as soon as they make a payment. With Unchained Commerce, you'll have the freedom to sell your fonts online without the hassle of traditional payment processors, and you'll get paid instantly for your work.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
